name: Add two whole numbers
summary: Verify that the calculator adds two whole numbers.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Enter 8, select +, enter 2, then press equals.

name: Subtract decimal values
summary: Verify that the calculator subtracts decimal numbers.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Enter 7.5, select -, enter 2.25, then press equals.

name: Multiply two values
summary: Verify that the calculator multiplies two values.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Enter 6, select *, enter 4, then press equals.

name: Divide by zero
summary: Verify that division by zero is handled gracefully.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Enter 9, select /, enter 0, then press equals.
steps.expected_results: The calculator displays an error or infinity message.

name: Test Case 01: Valid Login
summary: User successfully logs in with valid credentials and navigates to products page.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to login page, enter username 'standard_user', password 'secret_sauce', click login button

name: Test Case 02: Invalid Login
summary: User attempts to log in with invalid credentials and receives an error message.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to login page, enter username 'invalid_user', password 'wrong_password', click login button

name: Test Case 03: Add Product to Cart
summary: User adds a product to the cart successfully.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to products page, select 'Sauce Labs Onesie', click add button

name: Test Case 04: View Cart
summary: User views the cart and sees selected products.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to cart page, verify product count is 1

name: Test Case 05: Checkout Process
summary: User successfully completes the checkout process.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to cart page, click 'checkout' button, fill details, confirm order

name: Test Case 06: Logout Process
summary: User successfully logs out and is redirected to the login page.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to products page, click 'logout' button

name: Test Case 07: Add Multiple Products to Cart
summary: User adds multiple products to the cart and verifies the count.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to products page, select 'Sauce Labs Onesie', click add button, select 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', click add button, verify product count in cart is 2

name: Test Case 08: Empty Cart Checkout
summary: User attempts to checkout from an empty cart and receives a message.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to products page, click 'checkout' button, verify error message is displayed

name: Test Case - FR-001: Valid Login
summary: Validates user login with correct credentials.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button.
steps.expected_results: User should be redirected to products page.

name: Test Case - FR-002: Products Page Display
summary: Validates products are displayed after login.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link.

name: Test Case - FR-003: Add Product to Cart
summary: Validates adding a product to the cart.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link. Select a product from the list and add it to cart.

name: Test Case - FR-004: View Cart
summary: Validates cart content is displayed.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link. Add a product to cart. Go to Cart page.

name: Test Case - FR-005: Checkout Process
summary: Validates checkout process from adding to cart to completing order.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link. Add a product to cart. Go to Cart page. Proceed to Checkout.

name: Test Case - FR-006: Logout Process
summary: Validates user can successfully logout.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link. Logout from the application.
steps.expected_results: User should be redirected to login page.

name: Test Case - FR-007: Invalid Login
summary: Validates error message is displayed for invalid login credentials.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button. Enter wrong username (invalid_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button.

name: Test Case - NFR-001: Page Load Time < 3 seconds
summary: Validates page load time is less than 3 seconds.
preconditions: Generated by automation AI pipeline. Test data is stored in a TestLink custom field.

steps.actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and click 'Login' button, then enter valid username (standard_user) and password (secret_sauce). Click 'LOGIN' button. Navigate to Products page by clicking on the products link.
